meta.description: AI-native reading workspace for context-rich EPUB and PDF reading.

error.title: Something interrupted the reading flow.
error.body: Refresh the page to continue. If the problem persists, reopen the book from your shelf.

notFound.title: This page does not exist.
notFound.body: Return to the main reading workspace and pick up where you left off.

loading.title: Loading your reading workspace...
loading.body: Preparing your local library, reader state, and context surfaces.
